case_title: STANDARD RENT-A-CAR INC. VS RECTOR, JAMES L.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $522.20 FILED BY STANDARD RENT-A-CAR INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RECTOR, JAMES L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
